description: Use this API to tabulate a list of buses matching a partial extended bus name (activity FIND). This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = find(name, bskv)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Bus name, including imbedded asterisks that are treated as wildcard characters. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: bskv
parameters.description: Bus base voltage. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
